_comment: Field mapping for the Jira test-case adapter (skills/syncing-jira, scripts/create-jira-testcases.js, Phase 2.6 TG2.6-3). Maps our test-cases/*.json fields to a plain Jira issue. Human-editable; the adapter MUST NOT hardcode any of this. This creates ORDINARY Jira issues (no Xray app required), so it works on any Jira project. See agents/test-management-adapter.md and phase2.6-enhancements.md TG2.6-3.
_issue_type_comment: Many Jira sites have a 'Test' issue type; if yours does not, set JIRA_TESTCASE_ISSUETYPE=Task (or another existing type). The adapter retries without an unknown type's extras rather than failing the batch.

priority_map._comment: Our P0-P3 -> Jira priority names (default scheme). Configurable; remove this block to omit priority entirely.

_labels_comment: Static labels added to every created test-case issue, plus the story id and test_case_id are appended automatically for traceability.
_link_comment: Issue-link type used to link a created test-case issue back to the story issue (only when context.story.jira_issue_key exists). Must match a link type in your Jira instance.
_writeback_comment: Key under test-cases[].external_ids where the created Jira issue key is recorded (e.g. external_ids.jira = 'SK-50'). Drives idempotency: a case already carrying this key is skipped on re-run.
